hero.desc: Hello Future Aviators! Ready to push your limits? Come join the Aeromodelling & Payload Telemetry Research Group. Here, we design, build, and fly our very own UAVs together with an incredible research team!

heroCard.title: UAV & Payload Telemetry Research
heroCard.desc: From designing the airframe to operating the Ground Control Station (GCS)—experience the thrill of the entire unmanned aerial vehicle development cycle right in one lab!
list: Full access to fabrication & flight test facilities
Engage in exciting cross-divisional collaborative projects
Intensive mentorship to conquer prestigious competitions
Direct hands-on experience with cutting-edge technology

reasons.title: Why Should You Join Our Lab?

facilities.title: Advanced Facilities
facilities.desc: This is more than just a lab, it is a playground for your innovation. Gain extensive access to everything from fabrication tools and composite materials to industry-standard avionics testing equipment, enabling you to transform brilliant ideas into flight-ready prototypes. Here, you have the space to push past technical boundaries and bring your concepts to life.

mentorship.title: Expert Mentorship
mentorship.desc: Commit yourself to national and international competitions like KRTI or Teknofest. We don't just participate for the sake of it; we aim to bring home the championship title. Beyond honing your technical skills, you will build a network with innovators and other outstanding individuals, thereby gaining greater recognition for your research.

competitions.title: Be the Winner
competitions.desc: Here, you are guided directly by assistants and practitioners experienced in various prestigious flying robot competitions. The structured, to-the-point knowledge transfer allows your learning curve to accelerate rapidly.

career.title: Career Kickstart
career.desc: Build a solid engineering portfolio through real-world UAV projects that align with current industry standards. The technical skills you gain here are valuable assets sought after by major companies in the aerospace and defense sectors.

divisions.title: Choose Your Favorite Research Path!
divisions.desc: APTRG has four highly collaborative divisions working together to build a complete, cutting-edge UAV system.

mekanik.name: Mechanics
mekanik.desc: You'll take full control of designing the physical form of our UAVs. From tweaking aerodynamics and exploring composites to 3D printing, ensuring the structure is rock-solid and stable in flight.

sistem.name: Systems
sistem.desc: Meet the brain of the UAV! We focus on exploring avionics, flight controllers, Mission Planner software, and building ultra-fast telemetry systems.

gcs.name: GCS
gcs.desc: The command center is right here! You'll develop computer vision for smart missions, process telemetry data, and apply AI for real-time data analysis straight from the ground.

non-technical.name: Non-Technical
non-technical.desc: The backbone of the lab is in your hands! Take charge of managerial tasks, competition administration, sponsorships, finances, and creating awesome social media content to boost APTRG's branding.
